phase_name: Phases 5-8 (agent-tools.nix scaffold+mutation, mail-guard hook, mbsync freeze/thaw)

approaches_tried.approach: resolve Message-ID -> envelope id via himalaya envelope list filtered by full quoted subject phrase
approaches_tried.reason: himalaya's query filter does not match multi-word quoted phrases reliably; switched to single-longest-alnum-token narrowing + raw Message-Id verification via 'message read -p -H Message-Id'

approaches_tried.approach: test email-freeze's running-process detection via `exec -a mbsync sleep 20` or shebang-wrapped bash script invoked through /usr/bin/env
approaches_tried.reason: Linux sets /proc/pid/comm from the basename of the execve'd file, not argv[0]; env/bash indirection resets comm. Fixed by writing a script with a direct absolute-path shebang (#!/nix/store/.../bin/bash) named literally 'mbsync' and executing it directly, which yields comm=mbsync.

deviations.description: Plan treats Phase 5 (read-only wrappers) and Phase 6 (mutation wrappers) as separate phases/commits
deviations.reason: Both phases target the same new file (agent-tools.nix) and were implemented together in one pass for design coherence (shared mkPreamble/mkMutationPreamble), then verified together; committed as a single phase-5 commit (bcbce0d) with phase-6 markers checked off with no separate commit.
deviations.annotation: *(deviation: altered — phases 5 and 6 committed together in bcbce0d since they share one file)*

deviations.reason: settings.json had pre-existing uncommitted, unrelated hook restructuring (Stop/memory-nudge/wezterm hooks) present in the working tree before this session started (visible in initial git status). Since it's a single JSON file, my Phase 7 edits (Bash PreToolUse matcher + 7 deny entries) could not be isolated from that pre-existing diff without either losing the other uncommitted work or fabricating a synthetic merge. Committed as-is with a note in the commit message.
deviations.annotation: *(deviation: altered — commit e27c4be necessarily also contains pre-existing unrelated settings.json changes)*
